description_long: This is a modern two-story brick house with a hip roof and a spacious backyard featuring a rectangular swimming pool. The front of the house includes a double car garage with two parked vehicles and a paved driveway. Large windows dominate the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The backyard is enclosed by a dark fence and includes a patio area with outdoor furniture and a barbecue setup. A small balcony is visible on the upper floor, overlooking the pool and garden. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on outdoor living and open sightlines.
description: A modern two-story brick house with a hip roof, large windows, a double garage, and a backyard with a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, driveway, main entry, large windows, and the backyard with a pool and patio.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick exterior, vertical window arrangement, and the backyard fence with pool visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain brick wall, minimal windows, and the roof structure.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the garage, driveway, side windows, and a partial view of the backyard and pool.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with double doors, no porch, flush with facade, and adjacent to garage
